permitted_uses.use_name: Apartments containing 3 or 4 dwelling units within the Urban Service Area (RC-May
Shared housing use with 10 or fewer bedrooms in conjunction with a permitted
uses accessory to the foregoing uses

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: SINGLE DETACHED, SEMI -DETACHED AND DUPLEX DWELLINGS ON INDIVIDUAL LOTS

provisions.text: Buildings to be occupied or developed as a single detached dwelling, a semi-detached dwelling, an apartment (RC-May 23/24;E-June 13/24) or a duplex on individual lots shall conform with the following requirements:
Minimum lot frontage 9.75 metres (32 feet) for Apartment, (RC-may 23/24;E-June 13/24) single unit dwellings and duplexes 7.62 metres (25 feet) per unit for semi-detached
Minimum lot area 315.9 square metres (3,400 square feet) for single unit dwellings and duplexes 232.3 square metres (2,500 square feet) per unit for a semi-detached dwelling
Maximum height 10.67 metres (35 feet)
Maximum lot coverage 40 percent
Minimum front yard 6.1 metres (20 feet)
Minimum rear yard 6.1 metres (20 feet) Where parking is located in the rear yard, the minimum rear yard setback shall be 9.14 metres (30 feet)
Minimum side yard 1.22 metres (4 feet) or 0 metres for the common lot line between semi-detached dwellings units
Minimum yard along the Bedford Highway 9.14 metres (30 feet)
Buildings to be developed or occupied as rowhouses or townhouses on individual lots shall comply with the following requirements:
Minimum lot frontage per unit 6.1 metres (20 feet) per unit
Minimum lot area 50.04 square metres (1,615 square feet)
Maximum height 10.67 metres (35 feet)
Maximum lot coverage 40 percent
Minimum front yard 6.1 metres (20 feet)
Minimum rear yard 7.62 metres (25 feet)
Minimum side yard 3.05 metres (10 feet) for end units
Maximum number of units per building (not including secondary or backyard suites) (NWCC-Mar 8/21; E-Mar 27/21) 8 units
Deleted (RC-Aug 22/23;E-Sep 28/23)
Minimum yard along the 9.14 metres (30 feet) Bedford Highway

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: DWELLING UNITS ON A SHARED LOT

provisions.text: Buildings to be occupied or developed as a single detached dwelling, a semi-detached dwelling or a duplex, and rowhouses or townhouse on a common lot shall conform with the following requirements:
Minimum Lot Frontage 7.62 m (25 feet)
Minimum Lot Area 1486.4 sq. m. (16,000 sq. ft.)

Minimum Lot Area Per Dwelling Unit Single Detached 315.9 square metres (3400 square feet) Semi Detached/Duplex 232.3 square metres (2,500 square feet) Rowhouse/Townhouse 167.2 square metres (1800 square feet)
Minimum yard along Oakmount Drive 6.1 metres (20 feet)
Minimum yard along the Bedford Highway 9.14 metres (30 feet)
Minimum Rear Yard 6.1 metres (20 feet)
Minimum Side Yard 3.05 metres (10 feet)
Maximum Height of Building 10.67 metres (35 feet)
Maximum Lot Coverage 40 percent
Deleted (RC-Aug 22/23;E-Sep 28/23)
Maximum number of rowhouses/ townhouses units per building 8
Maximum number of dwelling units per lot (not including secondary or backyard suites) (NWCC-Mar 8/21; E-Mar 27/21) 24
Minimum distance between Buildings 3.7 m (12 feet)
Minimum distance between a shared private driveway and building 3.05 metres (10 feet) SPECIAL CARE FACILITIES (Deleted: RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22)
Deleted (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Site Design
Dwelling units on a shared lot shall provide a single or shared pedestrian walkway from the street to each dwelling unit.

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: Where common accessory structures or buildings are provided for recreational uses

provisions.text: Where common accessory structures or buildings are provided for recreational uses on a shared lot, a walkway from all dwelling units shall be provided to the accessory structure or building. Such walkways shall be a minimum of 1.5m (5 feet) in width and be constructed of hardscaping. General Building Design Requirements

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: Propane tanks and electrical transformers and all other exterior utility boxes shall be

provisions.text: Propane tanks and electrical transformers and all other exterior utility boxes shall be screened by means of opaque fencing, structural walls or suitable landscaping.

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: Electrical power, telephone, cable and similar utilities shall be brought from the

provisions.text: Electrical power, telephone, cable and similar utilities shall be brought from the public street to any building by underground conduit.

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: All dwelling units in a townhouse building shall have a front door that faces the street

provisions.text: All dwelling units in a townhouse building shall have a front door that faces the street or shared driveway.

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: Townhouse buildings shall feature variation between dwelling units through the use

provisions.text: Townhouse buildings shall feature variation between dwelling units through the use of at least one of the following:
changes in colour;
changes in material; or
projections and recesses of a minimum of 0.5 metres (1.6 feet).

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: End dwelling units having a flanking yard shall have a minimum of 30% architectural

provisions.text: End dwelling units having a flanking yard shall have a minimum of 30% architectural treatment on the wall so as not to create a solid wall. Such features shall include a minimum of one window on each floor and a minimum of one of the following:
changes in colour;
changes in material; or
projections and recesses of a minimum of 0.5 metres (1.6 feet). . Landscaped Recreation Space

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: a minimum of 13.94 square metres (150 square feet) of outdoor recreation space shall

provisions.text: a minimum of 13.94 square metres (150 square feet) of outdoor recreation space shall be provided for use by each dwelling unit.

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: Outdoor amenity space may be located in any front yard, rear yard, side yard, deck,

provisions.text: Outdoor amenity space may be located in any front yard, rear yard, side yard, deck, balcony, terrace or patio, or any combination thereof. Accessory Buildings

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: A maximum of one accessory building shall be permitted per dwelling unit, subject to

provisions.text: A maximum of one accessory building shall be permitted per dwelling unit, subject to the requirements of Part V, Section 29. Lot Frontage on Oakmount Drive

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: Lands identified in Appendix F shall be exempt from the requirement to have lot

provisions.text: Lands identified in Appendix F shall be exempt from the requirement to have lot frontage on a public street provided:
permission to access the parcels over Nova Scotia Transportation and Infrastructure Renewal (NSTIR) lands is provided by NSTIR; and
the width of any existing lots or proposed lots at the property line closest to Oakmount Drive is equal to or greater than the minimum required lot frontage identified above.

content_blocks.text: PART 9A: CUSHING HILL RESIDENTIAL (CHR) ZONE (RC-Dec 10/19;E-Feb15/20) No development permit shall be issued in a Cushing Hill Residential (CHR) Zone except for

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: one or more of the following uses:

content_blocks.text: In any Cushing Hill Residential (CHR) Zone, no development permit shall be issued except

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: in conformity with the following requirements:
SINGLE DETACHED, SEMI -DETACHED AND DUPLEX DWELLINGS ON

content_blocks.text: 1. Buildings to be occupied or developed as a single detached dwelling, a semi-detached dwelling, an apartment (RC-May 23/24;E-June 13/24) or a duplex on individual lots

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: shall conform with the following requirements:
content_blocks.text: (a) Minimum lot frontage 9.75 metres (32 feet) for Apartment, (RC-may 23/24;E-June 13/24) single unit dwellings and duplexes 7.62 metres (25 feet) per unit for semi-detached (b) Minimum lot area 315.9 square metres (3,400 square feet) for single unit dwellings and duplexes 232.3 square metres (2,500 square feet) per unit for a semi-detached dwelling (c) Maximum height 10.67 metres (35 feet) (d) Maximum lot coverage 40 percent (e) Minimum front yard 6.1 metres (20 feet) (f) Minimum rear yard 6.1 metres (20 feet) Where parking is located in the rear yard, the minimum rear yard setback shall be 9.14 metres (30 feet) (g) Minimum side yard 1.22 metres (4 feet) or 0 metres for the common lot line between semi-detached dwellings units (h) Minimum yard along the Bedford Highway 9.14 metres (30 feet)
2. Buildings to be developed or occupied as rowhouses or townhouses on individual lots

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: shall comply with the following requirements:
content_blocks.text: (a) Minimum lot frontage per unit 6.1 metres (20 feet) per unit (b) Minimum lot area 50.04 square metres (1,615 square feet) (c) Maximum height 10.67 metres (35 feet) (d) Maximum lot coverage 40 percent (e) Minimum front yard 6.1 metres (20 feet) (f) Minimum rear yard 7.62 metres (25 feet) (g) Minimum side yard 3.05 metres (10 feet) for end units (h) Maximum number of units per building (not including secondary or backyard suites) (NWCC-Mar 8/21; E-Mar 27/21) 8 units (i) Deleted (RC-Aug 22/23;E-Sep 28/23) (j) Minimum yard along the 9.14 metres (30 feet) Bedford Highway

content_blocks.text: 3. Buildings to be occupied or developed as a single detached dwelling, a semi-detached dwelling or a duplex, and rowhouses or townhouse on a common lot shall conform

(a) Minimum Lot Frontage 7.62 m (25 feet) (b) Minimum Lot Area 1486.4 sq. m. (16,000 sq. ft.) (c) Minimum Lot Area Per Dwelling Unit Single Detached 315.9 square metres (3400 square feet) Semi Detached/Duplex 232.3 square metres (2,500 square feet) Rowhouse/Townhouse 167.2 square metres (1800 square feet) (d) Minimum yard along Oakmount Drive 6.1 metres (20 feet) (e) Minimum yard along the Bedford Highway 9.14 metres (30 feet) (f) Minimum Rear Yard 6.1 metres (20 feet) (g) Minimum Side Yard 3.05 metres (10 feet) (h) Maximum Height of Building 10.67 metres (35 feet) (i) Maximum Lot Coverage 40 percent (j) Deleted (RC-Aug 22/23;E-Sep 28/23) (k) Maximum number of rowhouses/ townhouses units per building 8 (l) Maximum number of dwelling units per lot (not including secondary or backyard suites) (NWCC-Mar 8/21; E-Mar 27/21) 24 (m) Minimum distance between Buildings 3.7 m (12 feet) (n) Minimum distance between a shared private driveway and building 3.05 metres (10 feet) SPECIAL CARE FACILITIES (Deleted: RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) 4. Site Design 5. Dwelling units on a shared lot shall provide a single or shared pedestrian walkway from the street to each dwelling unit. 6. Where common accessory structures or buildings are provided for recreational uses on a shared lot, a walkway from all dwelling units shall be provided to the accessory structure or building. Such walkways shall be a minimum of 1.5m (5 feet) in width and be constructed of hardscaping. General Building Design Requirements 7. Propane tanks and electrical transformers and all other exterior utility boxes shall be screened by means of opaque fencing, structural walls or suitable landscaping. 8. Electrical power, telephone, cable and similar utilities shall be brought from the public street to any building by underground conduit. 9. All dwelling units in a townhouse building shall have a front door that faces the street or shared driveway. 10. Townhouse buildings shall feature variation between dwelling units through the use

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: of at least one of the following:
content_blocks.text: (a) changes in colour; (b) changes in material; or (c) projections and recesses of a minimum of 0.5 metres (1.6 feet). 11. End dwelling units having a flanking yard shall have a minimum of 30% architectural treatment on the wall so as not to create a solid wall. Such features shall include a

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: minimum of one window on each floor and a minimum of one of the following:
content_blocks.text: (a) changes in colour; (b) changes in material; or (c) projections and recesses of a minimum of 0.5 metres (1.6 feet). . Landscaped Recreation Space 12. a minimum of 13.94 square metres (150 square feet) of outdoor recreation space shall be provided for use by each dwelling unit. 13. Outdoor amenity space may be located in any front yard, rear yard, side yard, deck, balcony, terrace or patio, or any combination thereof. Accessory Buildings 14. A maximum of one accessory building shall be permitted per dwelling unit, subject to the requirements of Part V, Section 29. Lot Frontage on Oakmount Drive 15. Lands identified in Appendix F shall be exempt from the requirement to have lot

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: frontage on a public street provided:
content_blocks.text: (a) permission to access the parcels over Nova Scotia Transportation and Infrastructure Renewal (NSTIR) lands is provided by NSTIR; and (b) the width of any existing lots or proposed lots at the property line closest to Oakmount Drive is equal to or greater than the minimum required lot frontage identified above.
